title: A systematic review of single-cell RNA-seq integration methods
abstract: This systematic review summarizes integration, batch correction, and atlas harmonization methods for single-cell RNA-seq.

title: Survey of pathway analysis tools for transcriptomics
abstract: We present a survey of pathway-analysis tools, covering enrichment, topology, and network methods.

title: Deep generative modeling of single-cell atlases
abstract: We train a generative model over integrated atlases for representation learning.

title: Meta-analysis of protein language models for function prediction
abstract: This meta-analysis compares sequence-to-function models across benchmark datasets.
